name: deeppurpose_dti
summary: Given one drug SMILES string and one target protein amino-acid sequence, predict their binding affinity (pKd) using a shipped pretrained deep DTI model — no training required.

name: equidock_rigid_docking
summary: Given two unbound protein PDB structures (a randomly rotated/translated ligand and a receptor), predict the rigid docking pose (rotation + translation) that assembles them into a bound complex, output as a transformed ligand PDB.

name: danq_inference
summary: Given 1000-bp one-hot DNA sequences, run pretrained DanQ inference to predict the 919-dim chromatin-feature profile (TF binding, DNase hypersensitivity, histone marks) for each sequence.
